meta.label: Value capture form
meta.description: Custom project creation macro to enforce value capturing
meta.author: valentina.pena@dataiku.com

params.name: sep_admin
params.description: Admin / Hub Configuration

params.name: admin_api_token
params.label: Admin API Token
params.description: Admin API key value used to create an admin DSSClient

params.name: hub_project_name
params.label: Hub Project Name
params.description: Display name of the hub project (key is derived from this)

params.name: hub_project_owner
params.label: Hub Project Owner
params.description: DSS login that owns the hub project

params.name: hub_project_description
params.label: Hub Project Description
params.description: Description used when creating the hub project
params.defaultValue: Central hub for project intake logging

params.name: bronze_dataset_name
params.label: Bronze Dataset Name
params.description: Dataset name in the hub project for intake audit logging

params.name: sep_access
params.description: Access Control

params.name: project_create_groups
params.label: Allowed Project Creator Groups
params.description: If set, only users in at least one of these groups can use the macro to create projects. Leave empty to allow everyone.

params.name: sep_info
params.description: Contact Information

params.name: support_wiki_page
params.label: Wiki Page
params.description: Shown as a link at the top of the form when non-empty. Leave blank to hide.

params.name: support_admin_contact
params.label: Admin Contact
params.description: Shown at the top of the form when non-empty (e.g. email/DL). Leave blank to hide.

params.name: support_user_community
params.label: User Community
params.description: Shown at the top of the form when non-empty (e.g. Teams/Slack channel). Leave blank to hide.

params.name: sep_form
params.description: Access Control

params.name: fc_proj_types
params.label: Project Types (POC auto-added)
params.description: Radio options for Project Type. The macro always adds 'POC' (POC prefixes the project name/key and skips intake logging).

params.name: gbu_settings_enabled
params.label: Enable GBU / Owner Mapping
params.description: If disabled, hides the GBU and Owner fields in the macro form

params.name: gbu_settings
params.label: GBU Configuration
params.description: Define each GBU and its allowed Business/Technical Owners

params.name: sep_apm
params.description: APM ID Rules

params.name: apm_id_enabled
params.label: Enable APM ID
params.description: If enabled, the macro can show/require the APM ID field based on project type.

params.name: apm_id_project_types
params.label: APM ID Project Types
params.description: Project Type values that should show/require APM ID when APM ID is enabled.

params.name: fc_value_drivers_enabled
params.label: Enable Value Drivers
params.description: If disabled, hides the Value Drivers section in the macro form

params.name: fc_value_drivers
params.label: Value Drivers
params.description: Dropdown options for Value Drivers

params.name: fc_non_fin_impact_levels_enabled
params.label: Enable Non-Financial Impact Levels
params.description: If disabled, replaces non-fin impact dropdown with a free-text input

params.name: fc_non_fin_impact_levels
params.label: Non-Financial Impact Levels
params.description: Dropdown options for non-financial impact sizing

params.name: financial_value_drivers_enabled
params.label: Enable Financial Value Drivers
params.description: If disabled, treats all value drivers as non-financial

params.name: financial_value_drivers
params.label: Financial Value Drivers
params.description: Subset of Value Drivers that should use numeric USD input

params.name: sep_addons
params.description: Optional Add-ons

params.name: enable_snowflake_vars
params.label: Enable Snowflake Variables
params.description: If enabled, the macro can prompt for Snowflake connection variables and write them to the created project's global variables.

params.name: snowflake_vars_dataset_name
params.label: Snowflake Vars Mapping Dataset
params.description: Dataset name in the hub project containing Snowflake variable mapping (connection_name, warehouse, database, role, schema).
